Index

A B C D E F G H I K L M O P R S T U W 
All Classes|All Packages

C

ClassTypeNodeFactory<T extends ACTrieNode> - Class in trienodes
A very powerful factory that can create any type of TrieNode which extends ACTrieNode using reflection.
ClassTypeNodeFactory(Class<T>) - Constructor for class trienodes.ClassTypeNodeFactory
The Constructor takes a class which needs to have a constructor of the form [LanguageParameters, Boolean, Character], otherwise it will throw a NoSuchMethodException.
createAhoCorasickTrieFromParams(List<String>, LanguageParameter) - Static method in class actrie.AhoCorasickTrieFactory
Creates the AhoCorasickTrie using a default (ACTrieNode) to create the nodes.
createAhoCorasickTrieFromParamsWithNodeFactory(List<String>, LanguageParameter, AbstractACNodeFactory<T>) - Static method in class actrie.AhoCorasickTrieFactory
Creates the AhoCorasickTrie using a custom node type.
createFromDefaultValues(LanguageParameter, boolean, Character) - Method in interface trienodes.AbstractACNodeFactory
A simple factory method that takes a set of default parameters and then returns a new Suffix Trie Node based on it.
createFromDefaultValues(LanguageParameter, boolean, Character) - Method in class trienodes.ACTrieNodeFactory
A simple factory method that takes a set of default parameters and then returns an ACTrieNode to the caller.
createFromDefaultValues(LanguageParameter, boolean, Character) - Method in class trienodes.ClassTypeNodeFactory
A simple factory method that takes a set of default parameters and then returns a new Suffix Trie Node of a custom type based on it.
createFromDefaultValues(LanguageParameter, boolean, Character) - Method in class trienodes.UkkonenTrieNodeFactory
A simple factory method that takes a set of default parameters and then returns a new Suffix Trie Node supporting Ukkonens' Algorithm based on it.
createFromKeys(List<String>) - Static method in class ukkonenscsfinder.UkkonenSCSFinder
Creates an UkkonenSCSFinder from the list of words for which we want to generate an approximate SCS.
createFromParameters(LanguageParameter, List<String>) - Static method in class actrie.KeywordTextMatcher
Creates a new KeywordTextMatcher from a LanguageParameter and the keywords we want to match.
createFromParams(List<String>, LanguageParameter) - Static method in class ukkonenscsfinder.UkkonenSCSFinder
Creates an UkkonenSCSFinder from the list of words for which we want to generate an approximate SCS and the parameters of the underlying language.
createLanguageParametersFromAlphabet(List<Character>) - Static method in class alphabet.LanguageParameterFactory
Static factory method that creates a language based on the alphabet alone.
createLanguageParametersFromKeys(List<String>) - Static method in class alphabet.LanguageParameterFactory
Static factory method that creates a LanguageParameter based on the sample of words we give it.
createLanguageParametersFromParams(Function<Character, Integer>, List<Character>) - Static method in class alphabet.LanguageParameterFactory
Static Factory method that creates a language based on the alphabet, and a mapper function.
